stepTitle: Solve the following problem using analytical techniques: Suppose you first walk leg A, which is $$15.0$$ $$m$$ in a direction exactly $$30$$ degrees north of east, and then leg B, which is $$25.0$$ $$m$$ in a direction exactly $$40$$ degrees south of east. How far are you from your starting point? (Round answer to $$1$$ decimal place)
